Its new album continues the six-member group's ongoing narrative of self-definition. items.snippet: The FIFA World Cup is no longer an event enjoyed solely by soccer fans. Held once every four years, the tournament attracts billions of viewers worldwide and has long inspired musi...
items.description: The FIFA World Cup is no longer an event enjoyed solely by soccer fans. Held once every four years, the tournament attracts billions of viewers worldwide and has long inspired musicians to release official FIFA anthems, national team songs and unofficial tributes. K-pop has become increasingly visible in that tradition. items.title: Hybe’s 3 girl groups to drop single together
items.snippet: The three biggest girl groups under the umbrella of Hybe — Le Sserafim, Illit and Katseye — are bringing out a collaborative single on Friday, their agencies announced Monday. The...
items.description: The three biggest girl groups under the umbrella of Hybe — Le Sserafim, Illit and Katseye — are bringing out a collaborative single on Friday, their agencies announced Monday. The three acts will drop the digital single “Iconic by Mistake” and perform it together for the first time on a TV music chart show the day before its release. items.description: The8 and Vernon of Seventeen are joining forces with a team of hitmakers, including Pharrell Williams and Kirara, the pair’s agency Pledis Entertainment announced Monday. The two idols will form the subunit duo V8 to release a namesake EP on June 29. The mini album captures the freedom and energy they found to keep moving forward and the synergy between the two members. This marks the group's third top 10 entry on the Billboard 200, following "Girls" and "My World." According to Billboard's preview of the upcoming chart for this week on Sunday, aespa earned 41,000 equivalent album units during the latest tracking week. items.title: Finding home: Inside BoyNextDoor's first LP
items.snippet: Three years after their debut, BoyNextDoor returns with the group's first LP — and with what the band says may be its most personal work yet. The six-member boy band releases its f...
items.description: Three years after their debut, BoyNextDoor returns with the group's first LP — and with what the band says may be its most personal work yet. items.description: Heart of Woman (H.O.W.), the first girl group formed by the late R&B singer Wheesung's label Blue Brown Records, is drawing attention with its Y2K-inspired debut album "Heart Byte: Legacy" — reviving not only the sounds, but also the album formats and promotional practices that once defined K-pop in the late 1990s and early 2000s. items.title: BTS tops Billboard Japan’s mid-year album rankings
items.snippet: The fifth studio album from BTS, “Arirang,” nabbed the top spot on Billboard Japan’s main albums ranking for the first half of this year, according to the chart published on Friday...
items.description: The fifth studio album from BTS, “Arirang,” nabbed the top spot on Billboard Japan’s main albums ranking for the first half of this year, according to the chart published on Friday. Main track “Swim” and B-side track “2.0” made the mid-year Hot 100 chart at No. 38 and No. 87, respectively.
